overall.description: A cinematic video game scene featuring a character in futuristic armor running through an alien desert landscape at dusk. The sky displays dramatic purple and pink hues with scattered clouds, while the camera smoothly follows the character from a third-person perspective as they traverse from smooth sand dunes to rockier terrain.

agents.ego_description: running steadily across smooth sand dunes toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: large layered rock wall running along the right side of the desert
flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon
small illuminated structure or light source on the far left horizon
rippled sand surface with gentle undulations

segments.scene_description: The character runs across smooth desert sand at dusk, with a massive rocky cliff formation lining the right side and distant mesas visible against the purple sky. The terrain is empty and open, with the camera maintaining a steady follow shot from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain with scattered debris

events.description: ground surface transitions from smooth sand to rocky terrain with scattered stones and driftwood debris

agents.ego_description: continuing to run across increasingly rocky ground, navigating around scattered rocks and debris

entered.detail: loose stones and boulders scattered across the sandy ground
weathered wooden debris and branches lying on the ground
prominent rocky mound rising from the desert floor ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the desert floor becomes increasingly rocky and uneven, with scattered stones and driftwood debris replacing the smooth sand. The rocky cliff formation on the right draws closer and more detailed, while the character continues running toward a prominent rock outcrop ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an alien desert that transforms from a smooth expanse of sand into a rugged, debris-strewn terrain. It begins with the character running across open dunes under a purple dusk sky, with a massive rocky cliff formation lining the right side and distant mesas on the horizon. As the character progresses, the smooth sand gradually gives way to an increasingly uneven floor scattered with stones and driftwood. The scene then shifts as the cliff formation on the right draws closer and becomes more detailed, before the camera follows the character toward a prominent rock outcrop ahead.
